description.value: Aura moderate abjuration; CL 10th; Weight 1 lb.; Price 48,502 gp DESCRIPTION This wavy blade is almost transparently thin, and glows with ethereal energy upon being grasped. In addition to being a +3 ghost touch dagger, it can cast dispel magic once per day. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells dispel magic, plane shift; Special creator must be 9th level; Cost 24,402 gp
